title: Affiliate Manager
desc: The Affiliate Manager will develop the affiliate and publisher network while optimizing campaign performance to drive revenue growth. Responsibilities include partner acquisition, performance monitoring, payout negotiations, and ensuring traffic quality and compliance.

title: Sales Associate
desc: The Sales Associate will focus on acquiring new advertisers and generating revenue by pitching our performance marketing solutions. This role involves lead generation, client meetings, deal closures, and maintaining strong long-term business relationships.

title: Data Analyst
desc: As a Data Analyst, you will analyze campaign data to generate actionable insights that improve performance and ROI. The role includes reporting, dashboard creation, identifying trends, and supporting optimization strategies across teams.

title: Client Servicing Executive
desc: As a Client Servicing Executive, you will manage advertiser relationships and ensure seamless campaign execution. The role includes coordinating with internal teams, sharing performance reports, resolving queries, and maintaining high client satisfaction.
